author: leanderriefel
title: Split-brain plan persistence: --state scoping contract ignored by multiple handlers
notes: Genuine inconsistency: override_handlers correctly derives plan path from --state, but cmd.py:88, reorder_handlers.py:49, queue_render.py:179, and commit_log_handlers.py:193 call load_plan() without state path. However: (1) commit_log_handlers.py lines 119,171 are load_state() not load_plan() as claimed; (2) only triggers with non-default --state which is an uncommon workflow; (3) latent bug, no evidence of user-facing breakage. Real engineering flaw but overstated impact.
